text:
Once upon a time, a curious young rabbit named Benny loved exploring. One day, Benny discovered an old tree hidden behind some shrubs. The tree had twisted branches and sparkling eyes. Benny talked to it...

"...You're amazing."

The tree smiled.

"...With all those eyes?"

"It sees things."

..."

The tree sighed.

Suddenly, a wind howler swooped down. Benny bolted forward...but the howler didn't reach him. Instead, it paused. That's when Benny saw...

Their eyes met.

A rare friendship blossomed.

For weeks they'd chat and watch birds fly...

...

And occasionally smell...something...fishy.

That was enough.

They decided...

Never speak.

Their friendship lived on.

And so did Benny’s love...

For trees...with eyes.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
